chunks.title: David Spares Saul in the Cave
chunks.reason: Narrative of Saul entering the cave and David cutting his robe without killing him.

chunks.title: David's Speech to Saul
chunks.reason: David confronts Saul, explains his mercy, and contrasts their positions.

chunks.title: Saul's Repentance and Oath
chunks.reason: Saul weeps, acknowledges David's righteousness, and they make a covenant.
